name: Dubai International Airport
notes: World's busiest international airport by passenger numbers. Critical Gulf logistics hub connecting Asia, Europe, and Africa.

name: Singapore Changi Airport
notes: ASEAN aviation hub. Critical for regional supply chain logistics and Southeast Asian connectivity.

name: Istanbul Airport
notes: Eurasian crossroads. Turkey's leverage point connecting Europe, Middle East, Central Asia, and Africa.

name: Beijing Capital International Airport
notes: Primary gateway to China's capital. BRI logistics anchor for Central Asian routes.

name: London Heathrow Airport
notes: Western Europe's primary hub. UK post-Brexit trade gateway and Atlantic financial connection.

name: Tokyo Narita International Airport
notes: Northeast Asian logistics hub. Critical for Japan's export-oriented economy and US military alliance logistics.
